series_metadata.series_description: Each file relates to one company. Each file has 3 folders: International, Ohio Proud, and General. The Ohio Proud folder contains the license application, and the General folder contains, for example, newspaper articles about the firm. These are companies that both parts (the International focus and the Ohio Proud or domestic focus) of the Markets division works with. The company files do not contain any financial statements.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Review files every 3 years and dispose of documents that are no longer needed., Paper: Wastepaper
